title: Software Engineer
description:
**Company:** 




 GruntWrk is an AI workforce for independent eye\\-care practices. Our agents sit inside the clinic's software and run the front\\-desk grunt work: answering every call, verifying insurance overnight, texting patients, chasing lab orders, so the staff doesn't have to. We're a small team, shipping fast, building AI agents that real clinics depend on every day.
 



  





 We're onboarding new clinics constantly, and the work is growing in two directions at once: scaling the core system to handle more practices reliably, and building the new features each clinic needs on top of it. That's where you'd come in.
 



  





**What you'd actually work on:** 



* Scaling our platform as we onboard new clinics, keeping things fast and reliable as volume grows
* Building AI voice and text agents that handle real patient calls and messages
* Integrating with the EHR, insurance, and practice\\-management systems clinics run on
* Shipping new features across the eye\\-care workflow: intake, recall, insurance, order tracking, and whatever the next clinic needs
* Jumping across the stack and across problems, so you won't be boxed into one corner of the codebase



  





 We want a full\\-stack engineer who's genuinely AI\\-native: someone who builds with AI tools every day, can take a half\\-defined problem and run with it, and doesn't need anyone standing over their shoulder. If you do your best work in a fast, low\\-process team and rigid structure makes you itch, you'll fit right in.
 



**What we're looking for:** 



* Strong full\\-stack generalist, comfortable across frontend and backend
* At least 2 years of experience working in tech
* Solid with JavaScript/TypeScript and some real Python
* Fluent working with AI, both coding alongside it and building with LLMs
* Self\\-directed enough to own things and ship without hand\\-holding
* Comfortable talking directly with clients, a clear communicator who's good on a call
* Thrives in a fast, no\\-bureaucracy team
* Bonus if you've touched voice AI, LLM agents, or anything similar



  





**The setup:** 



* Fully remote
* Full\\-time, as an independent consultant (we're a US company, so you'd invoice us monthly)
* ₹2,00,000/month
* Heads up on hours: we work US time, and you'll be in direct contact with our US clinics and the team, so the working day runs late, till around 3 am IST. We can sort out the exact hours together, but the thing to know upfront is that this is a late schedule by design. If that works for how you live, great, and if not, this probably isn't the one.

title: Senior Tech Lead
description:
**Role Purpose**
 We are looking for experienced C\\+\\+ Software Engineer who is passionate about developing robust C\\+\\+ code basis the requirement specifications, to develop high impact casino games for our global customers
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Strong C\\+\\+ programming skills
* Good Linux and Windows development \\& debugging experience.
* Good Experience on Design Patterns, STL
* Experience with Visual Studio
* Ensure timely deliveries with agreed quality of all the tasks undertaken by the team.
* Good Experience on Design Patterns, STL
* Experience with Visual Studio
* Work with Sr. Management to accomplish business goals.


**Requirements**
* Minimum 5\\-8 years’ experience overall with core experience in C\\+\\+;
* Expertise in the full software/project life cycle, including specifications, requirements analysis, design/architecture, implementation, testing, and maintenance
* Experience with Git/SVN/Perforce or other configuration management systems
* Good Experience on code quality and code coverage tools.
* Good Experience on JIRA or other defect tracking system
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills and the ability to work in a fast\\-paced team environment


**Preferences**
* Gaming Experience
* Hands on Slot development experience


**Why Aristocrat?**
 Aristocrat is a world leader in gaming content and technology, and a top\\-tier publisher of free\\-to\\-play mobile games. We deliver great performance for our B2B customers and bring joy to the lives of the millions of people who love to play our casino and mobile games. And while we focus on fun, we never forget our responsibilities. We strive to lead the way in responsible gameplay, and to lift the bar in company governance, employee wellbeing and sustainability. We’re a diverse business united by shared values and an inspiring mission to bring joy to life through the power of play.
   

  

 We aim to create an environment where individual differences are valued, and all employees have the opportunity to realize their potential. We welcome and encourage applications from all people regardless of age, gender, race, ethnicity, cultural background, disability status or LGBTQ\\+ identity. EEO M/F/D/V
   

  

* World Leader in Gaming Entertainment
* Robust benefits package
* Global career opportunities


**Our Values**
* All about the Player
* Talent Unleashed
* Collective Brilliance
* Good Business Good Citizen


**Travel Expectations**
 None
   

  

**Additional Information**
 At this time, we are unable to sponsor work visas for this position. Candidates must be authorized to work in the job posting location for this position on a full\\-time basis without the need for current or future visa sponsorship.
